title: Jarul’s Legend Is Challenged
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows King Harald, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Usopp, Loki as Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.
scene: Elbaf’s warriors, Jarul, and the younger giants clash over the future of the island while dark forces twist pride and tradition into violence.

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: HARald, meet your future bride!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was born in alcohol village to the north.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am a student of the earth-wind arts.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lady Estrid carries the noble blood of the ancient giants.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am FATED to LOVE YOU FOR THE REST OF MY LIFE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She is a woman truly fit to become queen.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forget about that Eastern woman and her bastard.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oh, no, that's...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Elbaf (alcohol village) daughter from a prominent background

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The energies here are aligned to the East! This won't do at all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Estrid

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The King's Spirit is Leaking Out! Quick, shut the Windows!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and that mirror! It's positioned in a lethal five star configuration!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Dispose of it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Meet Asura, the horse of good fortune!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a fine steed worthy of you, your majesty... consider it a gift from my family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's sure to bring you good fortune!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's huge!! Why does it have eight legs?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guards! Take all of the jewels and gold to my room!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The King's vicinity should be focused on the energies of Earth and wind!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Also, inform the servants that from today onward, the King and I will take all our meals on silver platters.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Isn't that just an indulgence???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: 70-ish years ago...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In this age the rough seas still made travel between islands difficult.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Elbaf's advanced navigation techniques intrigued other countries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is a star which never moves called the pole star.*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oh, really?!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: King Harald! You met the Fishmen?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yep, it's about time. I even saw mermaids!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their people carry the blood of the ocean...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In their country, a prince was born by the name of Neptune...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And it wasn't just fishmen and Mermen around!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The sea creatures themselves were coming together in Jubilation!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Wow!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: 63 YEARS AGO, QUEST CASTLE, ELBAF

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Congratu- Lations, my Queen!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: While Harald was overseas...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's a healthy baby boy!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: His name is LOKI...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I spoke with the king about it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me get a good look at my son's face!

summary: This part advances the The Giants Turn on Their Legend through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
